subcodes.first_line: O revered friend, the letter which thou didst address to Áqá Mírzá Luṭfu'lláh hath been perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عزیز محترم نامه ای که به آقا میرزا لطف الله مرقوم نمودید ملاحظه گردید
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
